summary: Backend (6/6) + Frontend (all listed flows) tests passed for Fundacja D-Arka. Contact API validation, list, and creation verified. All 7 pages load with correct data-testid headers; all 4 project cards render; contact form submits successfully and validation on empty fields shows error toast without success state.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Lenis smooth-scroll emits console warning about non-static container position - cosmetic only.
Note: contact-topic is a <select> (not input); Playwright fill() fails but select_option() works. Not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Test contact messages created via POST /api/contact with TEST_ prefixed name/org for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover POST/GET /api/contact including 422 validation cases. Frontend flows verified via Playwright: nav to 7 pages, project cards, contact submit success and empty-form validation.
